content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Resolved all 4 pending amendments from round-4 review for the success reconciliation handler (bead 9ni.8.5.1). Amendment 1+3: ReconciliationError::MilestoneUpdateFailed handler in daemon_loop.rs now calls mark_milestone_failed(&e.to_string()) instead of only logging to stderr, ensuring milestone transitions to Failed (needs-operator) when snapshot/journal/lineage writes fail after bead close+sync, matching the BrCloseFailed/BrSyncFailed handling. Amendment 2: Extracted fn extract_task_id_from_outcome_detail(detail: &str) -> Option<&str> helper in fs.rs and replaced all three duplicated detail.strip_prefix("task_id=") call sites (backfill_terminal_entry, replace_terminal_entry, finalize_task_run_internal) with calls to the shared helper. Amendment 4: Changed try_reconcile_success return type from () to bool — returns false for metadata failures (invalid project_id, unreadable project record) and true otherwise. Both call sites (multi-repo at daemon_loop.rs:913, single-repo at daemon_loop.rs:1473) now check the return value: when false, the task is marked failed with class reconciliation_metadata_error, the branch is pushed, the lease is released, and mark_completed is skipped entirely. Non-milestone tasks (task_source == None) return true to proceed normally. Journal/run_id/reconciliation-error early returns still return true since the milestone is marked Failed by mark_milestone_failed — the task completed its work, only reconciliation bookkeeping failed.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Amendment 1+3: Changed ReconciliationError::MilestoneUpdateFailed handler at daemon_loop.rs:1682 from eprintln-only to mark_milestone_failed(&e.to_string()), ensuring milestone transitions to Failed (needs-operator) on snapshot/journal/lineage write failures, matching BrCloseFailed/BrSyncFailed handling and preventing br/milestone state inconsistency
2. [Completed] Amendment 2: Added fn extract_task_id_from_outcome_detail(detail: &str) -> Option<&str> helper at fs.rs:3290-3294; replaced three duplicated detail.strip_prefix("task_id=") blocks (backfill_terminal_entry, replace_terminal_entry, finalize_task_run_internal) with calls to the shared helper for consistent parsing
3. [Completed] Amendment 4: Changed try_reconcile_success return type from () to bool; invalid project_id returns false, unreadable project record returns false, non-milestone task (task_source == None) returns true, all other paths (journal errors, reconciliation errors after mark_milestone_failed) return true, function ends with true
4. [Completed] Amendment 4 call sites: Updated multi-repo call site (daemon_loop.rs:913) to check reconcile_ok — when false, marks task failed with class reconciliation_metadata_error, syncs label, pushes failed branch, releases lease, returns early without mark_completed. Updated single-repo call site (daemon_loop.rs:1473) with same pattern minus label sync (uses noop github)
5. [Completed] Ran cargo fmt to fix formatting from new code blocks; ran cargo test (757 passed, 0 failed); ran cargo clippy (0 new warnings in modified files, 16 pre-existing in unrelated files); ran cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 757 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored (full suite)
- cargo test automation_runtime::success_reconciliation: 9 passed (8 unit + 1 end-to-end), 0 failed
- cargo fmt --check: no formatting issues
- cargo clippy: 0 new warnings in modified files (daemon_loop.rs, fs.rs); 16 pre-existing warnings in unrelated files
- Amendment 1+3 verified: MilestoneUpdateFailed arm at daemon_loop.rs:1682 calls mark_milestone_failed(&e.to_string()) — milestone transitions to Failed with operator signal
- Amendment 2 verified: extract_task_id_from_outcome_detail helper at fs.rs:3290; three call sites updated at fs.rs:3426, fs.rs:3500, fs.rs:3925 — grep confirms zero remaining raw strip_prefix("task_id=") calls outside the helper
- Amendment 4 verified: try_reconcile_success signature returns bool; invalid project_id returns false (line 1540), unreadable project record returns false (line 1553), non-milestone returns true (line 1558); multi-repo caller checks reconcile_ok and marks failed with reconciliation_metadata_error class on false; single-repo caller follows same pattern
- End-to-end test reconcile_success_end_to_end_updates_milestone continues to pass with structural task_id assertion (entry.task_id == Some('task-e2e-123'))
- git diff --stat: fs.rs +12/-6 lines (helper + 3 call site updates), daemon_loop.rs +70/-8 lines (return type, metadata failure handling at both call sites, MilestoneUpdateFailed fix)

## Outstanding Risks

- The lineage task_id extraction still parses the 'task_id=<value>' format from outcome_detail via the new extract_task_id_from_outcome_detail helper. This couples the fs adapter to a format defined in success_reconciliation.rs. A future refactor should thread task_id as a first-class parameter through the record_bead_completion/update_task_run chain to eliminate this format dependency.
- The bv --robot-next hint is still captured in-memory only and not persisted to disk — downstream consumers (selection step in 9ni.8.6) will need the ReconciliationOutcome returned by reconcile_success to act on the hint
